Question: How can i Approve Delivery Boy
Solution: To approve a delivery, you will receive a Custom Notification along with an in-app pop-up. You can Approve or Deny the request directly from the pop-up, or access it later in the Approvals tab

Question: Payment status is not updated after completing the community maintanence payment.
Solution: Wait for a few minutes after making the payment, then tap Check Status in the Payments section. Ensure your internet connection is stable and verify the payment in Transaction History before trying again.

Question: Why is my payment failing?
Solution: Check your bank balance Ensure card/UPI details are correct Try using a different payment method If amount is deducted but not updated, please contact gatePass customer support.

Question: App crashes or becomes unresponsive during critical actions (visitor entry / check-in process)
Solution: Restart the app and try again. Make sure your app is updated and avoid closing it during the process.

Question: Why is the app not loading or showing a blank screen?
Solution: Ans : Check your internet connection Close and reopen the app Clear app cache (Android) Update the app to the latest version

Question: uploaded an image, but it is not showing.
Solution: Check if the image size is not too large Ensure internet connection is stable Try uploading again If the problem continues, the server may be temporarily busy.

Question: The app is very slow or lagging. What should I do?
Solution: Check your internet speed Close background apps Restart your device Update the app to the latest version

Question: If a particular resident is not receiving the existing feature
Solution: it means their app has not been updated. Please check the app version.

Question: For Some IOS users cannot access to gatePass app after installing.
Solution: Go to IOS Device settings > Accessibility > Motion > Reduce motion gesture and Enable it
